title: Devil May Cry Weapons Reborn
description: Devil May Cry Weapons in modern Minecraft!
body:
Devil May Cry Weapons in modern Minecraft!

You can now find all the weapons randomly in loot chests found in mines, strongholds, desert pyramids, jungle temples, underwater ruins and village blacksmiths. But they are pretty rare. 

Also you can craft all of them with exception of DrFaust. It is only avaliable from crative menu. 

All recipies can be found HERE or in the Gallery tab.



Devil May Cry Weapons: Reborn started as a port of 'Devil May Cry Weapons' made by AzureDoomC, which can be found here.

Model Credits: Mr-Mecha-Man
